brief.goal: Publish reusable AI model benchmark prompts with direct access to real model results.
brief.audience: AI builders comparing new model releases against the same creative brief.
brief.primaryAction: Read, copy, or download the benchmark prompt, then inspect the Kimi K3 result.
brief.visualTension: Editorial restraint paired with one high-signal orange action and a stark result panel.

brand.direction: Quiet editorial field notes: warm paper, black ink, precise typography, and one orange signal color.

attempted: magic-ripple-button — rejected because decorative ripple feedback conflicts with the deliberately quiet utility interface

sections.job: State what the benchmark library is and why it exists.
sections.layout: Large left-aligned editorial headline with a short supporting paragraph.
sections.mobileChange: Headline reflows to a compact three-line composition.
sections.componentRole: Semantic heading and supporting copy only.

sections.job: Expose the prompt and connect it to the Kimi K3 result and X post.
sections.layout: Prompt content and actions beside a dark result panel.
sections.mobileChange: Result panel stacks below the prompt and actions become full width.
sections.visualCarrier: Real prompt text, native controls, and contrasting result surface.
sections.componentRole: Native expandable prompt preview, copy button, download link, and result links.
sections.motionRole: Only brief color feedback on pointer interactions.

sections.job: Close with the collection's point of view and update expectation.
sections.layout: Two short statements separated across the page edge.

assets.source: Project-authored typographic artwork rendered from assets/og-image.svg

assets.role: Editable source for the Open Graph image
